overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a futuristic subway train in Cyberpunk 2077. The clip begins inside the train car observing other passengers, then transitions to looking out the window at the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape as the train arrives at Monroe & Sagan station.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic subway train interior with green leather seating

agents.ego_description: standing inside the subway train, holding onto a support pole while observing other passengers

notable_agents.action: woman with short dark hair sitting and drinking from a green bottle
two passengers standing near the doors looking at their phones

entered.detail: long green leather seating along the left side of the train car
yellow metal pole for passengers to hold
green illuminated display showing train route information
metal doors with glass windows leading to adjacent cars
blurred neon lights visible through the train windows

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit futuristic subway train with green neon lighting. Passengers are scattered throughout the car - a woman drinks from a bottle in the right foreground while others stand near the doors. The train is in motion, evidenced by the passing lights visible through the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track passing through dense cyberpunk cityscape

events.description: camera moves from interior seating area toward the train door to look outside
train arrives at Monroe and Sagan station, platform comes into view

agents.ego_description: standing by the train door looking out at the passing neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: metal window frame and glass providing view of the exterior city
tall futuristic buildings covered in neon advertisements and holograms
large illuminated commercial signs including one for Ratatouille
station platform with large illuminated Monroe and Sagan signage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to the train window, revealing a breathtaking view of the cyberpunk city at night. Neon billboards and holographic advertisements cover the towering skyscrapers as the train travels along elevated tracks. The train slows as it approaches the Monroe and Sagan station, with the platform and its bright signage coming into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a dimly lit subway car to a sweeping view of a neon-drenched metropolis. It begins inside the train under green neon lighting, passing by scattered passengers including a woman drinking from a bottle in the foreground. As the camera shifts toward the window, the interior fades away to reveal a breathtaking night cityscape filled with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The perspective then follows the train along its elevated tracks, where the motion gradually slows as the scene opens up to the bright signage and platform of the Monroe and Sagan station.
